untranslatable_reason: Signal requires tracking 'support/resistance level tested and rejected [N] times' and 'breakout distance % of range' — these require multi-bar state tracking and custom level detection not available in allowed indicators. Pivot points (r1, s1) used as proxy for support/resistance, but cannot verify rejection count or measure breakout distance as percentage of prior range without additional custom logic.
translation_notes: Used pivot points (r1, s1) as proxies for support/resistance levels. Used ADX > 25 to confirm established trend. Entry on crosses_above/below pivot levels with trend confirmation. Exit on reversal through same level. Stop loss set to reasonable 2% below entry. Cannot implement exact 'N rejections' logic or 'breakout distance as % of range' without state-tracking capabilities.
